title: Metabolic reprogramming of the retinal pigment epithelium by cytokines associated with age-related macular degeneration

paper_analysis.summary: The study experimentally examines how AMD-associated cytokines alter retinal pigment epithelium metabolism, affecting glycolysis, mitochondrial function, and ATP production in cell and ex vivo models.
paper_analysis.processed_plot_details: The paper appears to generate experimental data on retinal pigment epithelium metabolism under AMD-associated cytokine treatment, including glycolysis, mitochondrial function, and ATP production measurements in cell and ex vivo models, but no accessible data files were identified.
